name: hz-labs-portfolio-platform
description: Premium portfolio CMS, GitHub intelligence platform, and digital product studio website for Hz Labs.

scripts.build: npm.cmd run build --workspace backend && npm.cmd run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm.cmd run lint --workspace backend && npm.cmd run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm.cmd run typecheck --workspace backend && npm.cmd run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm.cmd run test --workspace backend && npm.cmd run test --workspace frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm.cmd run test:e2e --workspace backend && npm.cmd run test:e2e --workspace frontend
